title: MRP | money
description: Resource Pack turns diamond ore and deepslate diamond ore into coins
body:
**For comfortable use, download the [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features),[RP renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) and [CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod** **Для комфортного использования, скачайте [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features),[RP renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) и [CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** # Description | Описание
RU Превращает алмазную руду в монетки.устали от стандартной алмазной руды? этот ресурспак превратит вашу руду в монетки! Так же вы можете изменить на алмазы и у вас будут алмазы ввиде монеток
ENG Resource Pack turns diamond ore into coins. Tired of standard diamond ore? This resource pack will turn your ore into coins! You can also change to diamonds and you will have diamonds in the form of coins
